author: codex-agent

patch.value: GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/439\n\nScope: first baseline execution primitive for the SDK-first architecture. This does not complete every domain-specific primitive under pm-rjqr/pm-98cz/pm-zwpp, but it gives programmatic integrations a supported typed action executor while those domains move behind narrower SDK APIs.
Expose SDK runAction and PmClient execution surface for programmatic integrations

Promote the existing pm_run-style action dispatcher into the public SDK runtime so integrations can execute pm actions without shelling out, and have MCP reuse the SDK path. Duplicate check: searched all statuses for PmClient/runAction/high-level execution/GH-439; only the broad pm-usfg epic and primitive-family features matched, with no exact child item.

SDK runtime exports typed runAction and PmClient surfaces; MCP pm_run and narrow tools dispatch through the same SDK path; docs and tests cover create/list/get/update/close style execution in-process; temp-project proof shows a consumer can use @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk/runtime without spawning pm.
